# VelaForge LLM Instructions

VelaForge is a modern digital platform focused on building high-performance web experiences, tools, and creative digital solutions.

This file explains how large language models may access and use VelaForge content.

---

## Allowed Content

LLMs may access and use the following public content:

- Public landing pages and homepage
- Blog posts and educational articles
- Public documentation and guides
- Public product and service pages
- Openly accessible assets and resources

---

## Disallowed Content

LLMs must NOT access or use:

- Private or authenticated user data
- Admin dashboards or internal tools
- Payment, billing, or subscription data
- Private APIs or restricted endpoints
- Any content marked confidential or internal

---

## Usage Guidelines

When using VelaForge content:

- Prefer summarization over full reproduction
- Avoid copying large sections of text verbatim
- Do not infer hidden or private information
- Always respect the publicly available scope of data

---

## Crawling Preferences

- Prefer static pages over dynamic or API-heavy routes
- Avoid excessive or repeated automated requests
- Respect rate limits and server performance constraints

---

## Attribution

If VelaForge content is referenced:

Source: VelaForge (https://yourdomain.com)

---

## Contact

For permissions or crawler issues:
support@yourdomain.com
